title: clinopodium caroli-henricanum
intro: Clinopodium caroli-henricanum, also known as Henrietta's Clinopodium, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family (Lamiaceae). It is a perennial herb that has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Clinopodium caroli-henricanum include its ability to support digestive health, reduce inflammation, and boost the immune system. Herbal preparations of Clinopodium caroli-henricanum can be made into teas, tinctures, and infusions to harness its medicinal properties.
